steps.title: Name the sentence relationship
steps.content: The first sentence says North American foodways changed because of demand for certain grains. The second sentence identifies those grains as maize and wheat and explains their role. The blank must introduce a more specific version of the previous idea.

steps.title: Reject mismatched transitions
steps.content: B signals an alternative, but maize and wheat are not an alternative to the earlier idea. C signals comparison, but the second sentence elaborates rather than compares. D signals a second list item, but the passage is not listing separate claims. The answer is A.
